tagline.value: guest-room scopes what an agent is allowed to do, and refuses everything else by construction — not by a reminder you…

description.value: guest-room scopes what an agent is allowed to do, and refuses everything else by construction — not by a reminder you hope it reads.  I built it for my own work.  I wanted an agent that did the task and didn't get distracted or reach for things I never granted it.
